result.name: Trick embedder
result.description: Level: 1d6 Effect: A nonintelligent animal immediately and perfectly learns one trick (two tricks if the cypher is level 4 or higher) it is capable of physically performing (roll over, heel, spin, shake, go to an indicated place within long range, and so on). The trick must be designated when the cypher is activated.

sections.name: Trick embedder

The trick must be designated when the cypher is activated.
